stream_json.format_actual: per-turn JSONL — one JSON object per completed agent turn, NOT per-token streaming

large_prompts.rationale: stdin avoids ARG_MAX across platforms; macOS handles up to 200k inline but Linux often doesn't

sigterm_mid_stream.recovery: no partial parse possible; retry from scratch

invalid_model.recovery: surface 'Model configuration failed'; require user fix before retry

bad_cwd.recovery: surface fs error; user must create/correct path

implications_for_phase_1: callKimi must parse stderr for session id — stdout JSON does not carry it
Assistant text extraction: iterate event.content[], filter type=='text', concat .text fields
Think-type blocks may be surfaced as reasoning channel or ignored; prompt designer's choice
No per-token streaming UX possible; emit events as they arrive (1 per turn)
Large prompts (>100KB) must use stdin pipe with -p ""
Secondary session-id fallback via kimi.json.work_dirs[cwd].last_session_id is viable; use as backup when stderr parse fails
Auth check uses --max-steps-per-turn 1 for minimum cost
